zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmond Baker於1557年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格亞特 巴林頓時，他的父親John Barker23歲，母親Julianne Derebaugh30歲。他於1558年與Dorothie Barker在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格亞特 巴林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年12月13日在英國英格蘭素瑞享年8歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯泰恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Baker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from Middle English bakere, Old English bæcere, a derivative of bacan ‘to bake’. It may have been used for someone whose special task in the kitchen of a great house or castle was the baking of bread, but since most humbler households did their own baking in the Middle Ages, it may also have referred to the owner of a communal oven used by the whole village. The right to be in charge of this and exact money or loaves in return for its use was in many parts of the country a hereditary feudal privilege. Compare Miller . Less often the surname may have been acquired by someone noted for baking particularly fine bread or by a baker of pottery or bricks.

Americanized form (translation into English) of surnames meaning ‘baker’, for example Dutch Bakker , German Becker and Beck , French Boulanger and Bélanger (see Belanger ), Czech Pekař, Slovak Pekár, and Croatian Pekar .

History: Baker was established as an early immigrant surname in Puritan New England. Among others, two men called Remember Baker (father and son) lived at Woodbury, CT, in the early 17th century, and an Alexander Baker arrived in Boston, MA, in 1635.

variants.name: Miller
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a miller. The standard modern vocabulary word represents the northern Middle English term miller, an agent derivative of mille ‘mill’, reinforced by Old Norse mylnari (see Milner ). In southern, western, and central England Millward (literally, ‘mill keeper’) was the usual term. In North America, the surname Miller has absorbed many cognate surnames from other languages, for example German Müller (see Mueller ), Dutch Mulder and Molenaar , French Meunier , Italian Molinaro , Spanish Molinero , Hungarian Molnár (see Molnar ), Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Mlinar , Polish Młynarz or Młynarczyk (see Mlynarczyk ). Miller (including in the senses below) is the seventh most frequent surname in the US.

South German, Swiss German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Müller ‘miller’ (see Mueller ) and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in other European countries, notably in Poland, Denmark, France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), and Czechia; compare 3 below.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Croatian, Serbian, and Slovenian   Miler   ‘miller’, a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Baxter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English baxter ‘baker’ (from Old English bæcestre ‘baker’, earlier ‘female baker’, the feminine equivalent of bæcere). Compare Baker .

nameMeanings.name: Edmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Edmund  , now in quite frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmond Baker was born in 1557, in Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Barker, was 23 and his mother, Julianne Derebaugh, was 30. He married Dorothie Barker in 1558, in Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 December 1565, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 8, and was buried in Staines, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmond Baker est né en 1557, à Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Barker, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Julianne Derebaugh, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Dorothie Barker en 1558, à Great Barrington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1565, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 8 ans, et a été enterré à Staines, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmond Bakerが1557年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグレアト バーリントンで生まれた時，父John Barkerは23歳，母Julianne Derebaughは30歳であった。1558年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグレアト バーリントンでDorothie Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年12月13日にイギリスイギリススリーで8歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックススティアインスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmond Baker(이)가 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그리트 배링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barker(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianne Derebaugh(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그리트 배링턴에서 Dorothie Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 8세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테인스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmond Baker родился в 1557 г. в местности грит баррингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Barker было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Julianne Derebaugh, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothie Barker в 1558 г. в местности грит баррингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 декабря 1565 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 8 лет и был похоронен в местности стеинесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
